metadata.description: Claude Code statusline HUD with a per-position gradient progress bar. Forked from jarrodwatts/claude-hud.

plugins.name: prism-hud
plugins.description: Statusline HUD with a per-position gradient progress bar (cool blue → warm red). Each dot shows its own color; the warmer colors only appear when the bar is near full, so tension is visible at a glance.
